ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the property */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the property sale was closed */,
  "sold_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sq_ft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "beds_baths" TEXT /* Number of bedrooms and bathrooms */,
  "price_sq_ft" TEXT /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, townhouse) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under contract) */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "hoa_fees" TEXT /* Monthly Homeowners Association (HOA) fees */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the agent belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales the agent has made */,
  "total_sales_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of sales the agent has made */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the agent from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate team */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker overseeing the team */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of agents in the team */,
  "team_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the team */,
  "team_sales_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of sales made by the team */,
  "team_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the team from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the broker's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the broker has been in the real estate business */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales the broker has overseen */,
  "total_sales_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of sales the broker has overseen */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the broker from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "listing_price" TEXT /* Original listing price of the property */,
  "sale_duration" INTEGER /* Duration from listing to sale in days */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned by the agent from the sale */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "closing_agent" TEXT /* Name of the closing agent */,
  "closing_lawyer" TEXT /* Name of the closing lawyer */,
  "closing_cost" TEXT /* Total closing cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average sale price in the neighborhood */,
  "average_sq_ft" INTEGER /* Average square footage in the neighborhood */,
  "average_price_sq_ft" TEXT /* Average price per square foot in the neighborhood */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "median_price" TEXT /* Median sale price in the neighborhood */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days on the market in the neighborhood */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Number of properties currently on the market in the neighborhood */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in average price compared to the previous period */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of sales in the neighborhood */,
  "new_listings" INTEGER /* Number of new listings in the neighborhood */,
  "absorption_rate" TEXT /* Number of months it would take to sell the current inventory at the current sales rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who requested the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, market analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information or findings of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, broker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property details */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property details were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property details */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior, floor plan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
